meta.title: Contact
meta.description: Contact Power On Interio to discuss residential interiors, commercial offices, and turnkey execution across India.

hero.title: Tell us about your space.
hero.description: Share your project details, and we’ll recommend the right next step for your interior project anywhere in India.

cards.serviceAreaHelp: We handle interior projects across India, including Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Chennai, Mumbai, Pune, Delhi NCR, Ahmedabad, Kolkata, Jaipur, Kochi, and Coimbatore. If your city is not listed, contact us and we’ll confirm the next step.

form.helperText: Send your enquiry directly to our inbox and we’ll reply as soon as possible.

status.successMessage: Thanks for reaching out. Your enquiry is now with our team, and we’ll connect with you shortly by phone or email.
status.errorMessage: We couldn’t send your enquiry just now. Please try again in a moment, or email us directly and we’ll assist you manually.
